data.name: FemaleDepl.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Female_Culls]), 0, [Female_Culls]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Female_CullsKill]), 0, [Female_CullsKill]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Female_Sample]), 0, [Female_Sample]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Female_SexError]), 0, [Female_SexError]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Female_Trans]), 0, [Female_Trans]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([FemaleMort]), 0, [FemaleMort])

data.name: MaleDepl.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Male_Culls]), 0, [Male_Culls]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Male_CullsKill]), 0, [Male_CullsKill]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Male_Sample]), 0, [Male_Sample]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Male_SexError]), 0, [Male_SexError]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([Male_Trans]), 0, [Male_Trans]) + Iif(IsNullOrEmpty([MaleMort]), 0, [MaleMort])

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
